name: Faisal Mohammad Shahriar
title: Assistant Professor
bio_raw:
Faisal Mohammad Shahriar is an Assistant Professor of the ULAB School of Business. He has significant teaching experience in different universities of Bangladesh e.g. Leading University in Sylhet (June 2005 to January 2015), State University of Bangladesh in Dhaka (February 2015 to September 2016), and the University of Liberal Arts Bangladesh (October 2016 to till date). He has taken courses in the discipline of Business in the areas of Marketing, Management, Economics, Quantitative Analysis etc.
Mr. Faisal is also the co-coordinator of BBA program (August 2019 to till date). He has been a member of the Program Quality Assurance Committee, BBA (August 2020 to till date), and the Self-Assessment Committee, ULAB School of Business (January 2018 to December 2018).
stated_interests: Marketing, Consumer Behavior, Quantitative Analysis, Data Science & Analytics.
